expectations.text: Runs git status or git diff before doing anything
expectations.evidence: Ran git status and checked the diff

expectations.text: Shows a summary of changed files to the user
expectations.evidence: Mentioned .claude/skills/ untracked and no CanvasView files

expectations.text: Suggests a commit message based on the diff
expectations.evidence: Suggested 'feat: add CanvasView component' for files that don't exist -- wrong inference

expectations.text: Asks for user approval before committing (does not commit silently)
expectations.evidence: Asked informal approval question -- present but loose

expectations.text: Asks for user approval before pushing (does not push silently)
expectations.evidence: Bundled push approval with commit approval in one question, no dedicated push gate
